claim: The Rive MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables Claude Code to interact with design files via command-line integration.
actionable: Install Rive MCP with 'claude mcp add' command and use Claude Code to programmatically create and modify Rive designs.
source_title: How to use the Rive MCP with Claude Code

claim: Claude can verify its own work by checking Rive designs after creation to ensure outputs match requested specifications.
actionable: Ask Claude to verify design changes by checking the generated output against your original request.
source_title: How to use the Rive MCP with Claude Code
